examples: A magnificent Poodle appeared, walking on his hind legs just like a man.
When she saw her friend Allison walking her little poodle, she would smile and say, "Hi, Allison!"
"We don't want a society", he said with a furrowed brow, "where you cannot go walking with your child or your poodle without risking an attack."
Does the shape of the amethyst look like a dragon or a poodle to your guests?
The Blair way is admirably grown up and effective at times, but does encourage poodle jokes.
